auth.title:
Auth hosts secret selectors for username and password
+optional

deleteHookOnFinish.title:
DeleteHookOnFinish determines whether to delete the Gerrit hook for the project once the event source is stopped.
+optional

events.title:
Events are gerrit event to listen to.
Refer https://gerrit-review.googlesource.com/Documentation/cmd-stream-events.html#events

gerritBaseURL.title: GerritBaseURL is the base URL for API requests to a custom endpoint

hookName.title: HookName is the name of the webhook

maxTries.title:
MaxTries is number of attempts when posting an event to the target url
+optional

metadata.title:
Metadata holds the user defined metadata which will passed along the event payload.
+optional

projects.description: List of project namespace paths like "whynowy/test".

webhook.title: Webhook holds configuration to run a http server
